Identification

Enter a nickname to distinguish this vehicle.

Link this vehicle with one of your Telematics Devices to begin automatically collecting data.

Vehicle Identification Number or Serial Number.

e.g. 1999, 2012, etc.

e.g. Toyota, GMC, Chevrolet, etc.

e.g. 4Runner, Yukon, Silverado, etc.

e.g. SE, LE, XLE, etc.

Maintenance Schedule

Choose a Service Program. Service Programs automatically manage Service Reminders for Vehicles that share common preventative maintenance needs.

None

No Service Reminders will be created

Custom Fields

Add organization-specific metadata to this vehicle. These fields are unique to your fleet operations.

Used for accounting allocation

Meter Settings

Used to flag anomalous fuel entries
